tasks.title: Prospect DeFi integrators on Base
tasks.prompt: Identify 5 candidate DeFi integrators or protocols on Base that could integrate SINC liquidity modules or the Fluid amplifier. For each: name, why they fit, integration surface, estimated deal size, contact path. Output as structured list.

tasks.title: Prospect SMBs for WebBuilder/DeFi bundles
tasks.prompt: Identify 5 SMB segments that would pay for a website + embedded DeFi payment/treasury bundle settled in SINC/AXM. For each: segment, pain, bundle pitch, willingness-to-pay estimate, acquisition channel.
